tools.name: readiness_check
tools.description: Full DORA readiness score + Ampel per article. Returns GREEN/YELLOW/RED/GREY for all 26 articles, score 0-100, days until deadline.

tools.name: article_status
tools.description: Detailed Ampel for a specific DORA article. Each check with GREEN/YELLOW/RED conditions and evidence.

tools.name: gap_report
tools.description: DORA compliance gaps. RED/GREY/YELLOW items with priority and required actions.

tools.name: evidence_summary
tools.description: All evidence artefacts for an entity with hashes and expiry dates.

tools.name: collect_art10
tools.description: Collect live Art. 10 evidence from NVD, CISA KEV, CERT-Bund. Auto-assesses.

tools.name: entity_list
tools.description: List all registered regulated entities.

tools.name: create_entity
tools.description: Register a new regulated entity.

tools.name: audit_trail
tools.description: Chain-linked audit log with integrity check.

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Generate data-driven DORA Ampel PDF report. Score, gap analysis, provider register, audit trail integrity.

tools.name: freshness_check
tools.description: Run freshness watchdog. Expires stale evidence, downgrades GREEN->YELLOW->GREY if evidence too old.

tools.name: bridge_report
tools.description: Bridge gap analysis: classifies gaps by DATA/EVIDENCE/POLICY/WORKFLOW with closure path, owner, effort level.

tools.name: register_provider
tools.description: Register an ICT third-party provider for DORA Art. 28 Register of Information. Stores provider data and creates evidence.

tools.name: check_contract
tools.description: Check DORA Art. 30 contract clauses for a provider. Returns PASS/WARN/BLOCK with missing clauses and bridge classification.

tools.name: assess_all
tools.description: Re-run full assessment for an entity. Recomputes Ampel statuses from all available evidence.

tools.name: onboard_entity
tools.description: Full entity onboarding: creates initial RED assessments for all 39 checks, collects auto-evidence from live sources, re-assesses, and returns readiness score.

tools.name: bridge_resolve
tools.description: Start bridge resolution workflow. Generates templates (Risk Acceptance, Contract Renegotiation, Concentration Policy, Exit Strategy), tracks approval process. Call bridge_approve to sign off.

tools.name: bridge_approve
tools.description: Approve or reject a bridge resolution. On approval: creates signed evidence, upgrades Ampel to GREEN, logs to audit chain.

tools.name: bridge_status
tools.description: Check status of all bridge resolution workflows for an entity. Shows open, pending, closed, rejected.

tools.name: reg_watchdog
tools.description: AI Regulatory Watchdog: scrapes EBA/ESMA/BaFin/CERT-Bund for DORA updates. Returns alerts with affected articles and severity. Run daily via cron or on-demand.

tools.name: azure_ad_check
tools.description: Live Azure AD integration: MFA registration %, risky users, conditional access policies. DORA Art. 9 evidence. Requires Azure AD config in integrations_config.json.

tools.name: servicenow_sync
tools.description: ServiceNow incident + change management sync. DORA Art. 17/21 evidence. Returns 30-day incident stats, classification, resolution rates.

tools.name: llm_clause_check
tools.description: LLM-based DORA Art. 30 contract analysis. Paste contract text, get clause-by-clause PRESENT/PARTIAL/MISSING for all 15 mandatory clauses. Uses Claude API.

tools.name: cross_oracle_assess
tools.description: Enterprise cross-oracle assessment. Runs 18 checks across CyberShield (NIS2/ISO 27001), SupplyChainOracle (LkSG/CSRD), HealthGuard (MDR/GDPR), CFOCoPilot (XRechnung), TaxOracle (DAC6), LegalTechOracle (DORA contracts). Auto-stores evidence and updates Ampel status.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Server + DB status.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Quick connectivity test.

tools.name: bus_status
tools.description: Oracle Event Bus status: events, cross-refs, connected oracles.

tools.name: escalation_status
tools.description: Get findings, SLA breaches, escalation status per entity.

tools.name: run_escalation
tools.description: Trigger escalation engine: auto-create findings, check SLA, escalate.

tools.name: whatif_provider
tools.description: Simulate provider failure: which articles/checks are affected, score impact, risk level.

tools.name: whatif_stale
tools.description: Simulate stale evidence: what happens if a check stays stale for N days.

tools.name: board_summary
tools.description: Executive board summary: overall score, top 5 risks, overdue findings, SLA breaches, concentration risk, evidence health, owner workload. Designed for management/board reporting.

tools.name: update_finding
tools.description: Update finding lifecycle: claim, set remediation plan, request re-test, close, or accept risk. Status flow: open -> in_progress -> retest_pending -> closed | risk_accepted.

tools.name: retest_finding
tools.description: Re-test a finding: collect fresh evidence, reassess check, auto-close if GREEN. Full closed-loop.

tools.name: score_trend
tools.description: Score trend over time: weekly deltas, trajectory, peer benchmark. Shows improvement or decline.

tools.name: dependency_graph
tools.description: Full provider dependency graph: providers, systems, checks, blast radius, SPOF detection.

tools.name: incident_flow
tools.description: DORA incident lifecycle: log, classify, notify (BaFin), close. Each step creates signed evidence.

tools.name: evidence_pack
tools.description: Export evidence pack for article/check/entity. Pruefer-ready: evidence, assessments, findings, audit trail, signatures.

tools.name: provider_country_risk
tools.description: Enrich provider dependencies with OECD economic risk: GDP, unemployment, CLI per provider country. DORA Art. 28-31 relevant.

tools.name: contract_upload
tools.description: Upload contract text for DORA Art. 30 analysis. Creates document record with SHA-256 hash, version tracking, audit trail.

tools.name: contract_analyze
tools.description: Analyze contract against 15 DORA Art. 30 mandatory clauses. Returns compliance status per clause with confidence score, extracted text, gap reasoning, suggested fix.

tools.name: contract_status
tools.description: Overview of all analyzed contracts per entity. Shows clause gaps, review status, document versions.

tools.name: cross_regulation_check
tools.description: Tag findings with cross-regulation impact (DORA + MiCA + AMLR). Shows which DORA findings also affect MiCA insider info or AMLR screening.

tools.name: regulation_impact
tools.description: Show cross-regulation impacts for a specific DORA article. Maps DORA → MiCA + AMLR.

tools.name: bafin_report_draft
tools.description: Generate ITS 2024/1772 compliant BaFin incident report draft. All mandatory fields per DORA Art. 19/20. Preview mode — requires board approval.

tools.name: bafin_approve_send
tools.description: Approve BaFin report for submission (4-eyes principle). Creates signed approval evidence.

tools.name: cve_asset_map
tools.description: Map CVE/vulnerability to internal ICT providers and systems. Auto-creates findings for critical matches. DORA Art. 10.

tools.name: policy_draft
tools.description: Generate DORA policy/framework document draft for a specific article. 8 templates available (Art. 5,6,8,10,11,17,28,30). Uses entity data for customization.

tools.name: create_trial
tools.description: Create temporary trial entity (48h) for self-service DORA assessment. No login needed.

tools.name: run_trial_assessment
tools.description: Run complete DORA+MiCA assessment for trial entity. Returns score, gaps, automation potential.

tools.name: generate_trial_report
tools.description: Generate watermarked trial report with score, gaps, and CTA.
